item.title: Download Blank And Secure 8.33
item.description: Blank And Secure is a application lightweight and portable allows you to completely erase your sensitive data without possibility to restore. This add-on accomplish this by overwriting your files with zeros (0) before you delete them. This method is also called "zeroing data / drives". You should know that once completed, the complete data can't be recovered, so you should only use this tool if you want to permanently delete your files. item.title: Download Winslop 26.03.155
item.description: What is "Slop"? The term "slop" refers to low-value system components that are often pre-installed and contribute little or no useful function. These elements consume valuable resources and can reduce user efficiency by limiting overall system control. Information about Winslop software Winslop is a lightweight and innovative utility for Windows. This tool is designed to remove unnecessary components in the system, often referred to as "slop," which can degrade operating system...
